steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Start by isolating the absolute value expression:
$$-4|6x+5|+3=-17$$
$$-4|6x+5|=-20$$
$$|6x+5|=5$$

steps.title: Solve both cases
steps.content:
An absolute value equation splits into two equations:
$$6x+5=5$$
$$x=0$$
$$6x+5=-5$$
$$x=-\frac{5}{3}$$
The answer is C.
